authority_rule: The append-only ledger is the authoritative continuity record; materialized head files are projections that must match the accepted head.
append_only_rule: Accepted entries form one sequence-linked chain by previous_entry_hash, state_sequence, and predecessor_state_hash; silent truncation, replay, or fork is invalid.
recovery_policy: materialized head must equal accepted ledger head before activation
ledger/head disagreement enters recovery_or_quarantine instead of trusting the convenient copy
truncated, replayed, tampered, or forked ledgers fail closed
non_claims: does not emit continuity witnesses or citizen-facing receipts
does not implement anti-equivocation across multiple signed successors
does not claim first true Godel-agent birth
